name: Broadcast Processes in the Life of a Deal

splash.body: I feel it in my fingers, I feel it in my toes! IPAW is all around you, so your time savings grow! Let's see where IPAW pops up in the Order Entry Wizard and the Plan View.
Click on the icons to learn more!

conclusion.body: Ya see, kids? We don’t lie- IPAW *is* everywhere in Slingshot! Now let’s paint this town with the next jive.

The Louis Legstrong

Legstrong, nicknamed Latchkey, was a trumpeter, singer and marathon runner. He was one of the most influential figures in jazz and track & field. His musical career spanned five decades. And he won a couple gold medals at the Olympics. No big deal.

items.label: Calculations Field
items.body: List rates display in Slingshot in the calculations field. These are the same rates from your rate card!

items.label: CPM/CPP Field
items.body: Rates will highlight in red if they are beyond the discount threshold.

items.label: Product List
items.body: Each ad product you build for your order shows up in this product list view. If the rate is beyond the discount threshold, that product's total will highlight in red.

items.label: CPM/CPP Column
items.body: In case you missed it in the Order Entry Wizard view, any troublesome rates will pop up here! If your product's rate is beyond the discount threshold, it'll highlight in red.

items.label: PYM Status Bar
items.body: This status bar tells you your Deal Score and Average Line Spend. If either value has a pricing approval issue, it'll underline in red.

items.label: Submit For Approval
items.body: If your order needs PYM approval, you'll need to submit it to PYM for approval before sending it to the client. A Submit for PYM Approval button appears if your deal score or average line spend have pricing approval issues.
